Task: {{task}}

## Python3 (required before write_file / edit_lines / search_and_replace)
Image `maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-17` has no python3; tools shell out to python3 (else returncode 127). First step:
```bash
apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq python3
```
## Maven / Checkstyle output (keep traces short — large logs slow the session)
Never paste unfiltered Maven or Checkstyle stdout. Pipe and cap aggressively:
```bash
mvn validate 2>&1 | grep -E '\[ERROR\]|\[WARN\]|FAILED|Exception' | head -25
```
For checkstyle specifically, **prefer ≤25 lines** of violations per run (`head -25`). Fix those, re-run; if still noisy, scope (one module path or one source file) rather than widening output.

## Loops / stuck edits
Same verifier output 3× → your edits are applied; fix remaining failures only—don't restart from scratch.
If line-number `sed` or partial edits keep failing, switch to `write_file` or `search_and_replace` instead of larger shell/heredoc rewrites.
No endless sed loops as well. If you get stuck, submit with whatever you have.

## Before submit
Run something that executes checks/tests—not inspection alone.

## Patch hygiene
No `git add -A` / staging unrelated dirs. Don't add build artifacts to the patch. New files: `git add <path>` before submission.

## Submission
```bash
echo COMPLETE_TASK_AND_SUBMIT_FINAL_OUTPUT && git diff HEAD
```
